title.en: The Art of the Long View

summary.en: Peter Schwartz's classic introduction to scenario thinking: identify driving forces, critical uncertainties, and multiple plausible futures before committing to one strategy.
summary.zh: Peter Schwartz 关于情景思考的经典入门：先识别驱动力、关键不确定性和多个可能未来，再决定战略选择。

recommendation.en: Read this before turning Business Model Environment into scenario planning. It helps teams avoid single-forecast thinking and compare which moves stay robust across futures.
recommendation.zh: 在把商业模式环境扫描升级为情景规划前，推荐先读它。它能帮助团队避免单一预测，并比较哪些战略动作在多个未来下都稳健。

sources.label: Peter Schwartz · The Art of the Long View · Currency Doubleday · 1991
